calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-19-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Elliott A. Myles, Clerk Karissa Shaw, Not reported. (525)

APPEARANCES:
Richard C. Taylor appearing in Pro Per
Dan Scanlan, Vice President of Dispatch, Towing and Quality Assurance at Auto Return appearing on behalf of Auto Return

At 9:18 am, this cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.

Dan Scanlan testifies on behalf of Appellant Auto Return. Documentary evidence viewed by Court, but not admitted into evidence.

The Court questions respondent Richard C. Taylor regarding Mr. Scanlan's testimony.

Respondent Taylor testifies on his own behalf.

The Court questions both parties regarding factual issues of case.

9:50 am, hearing is concluded, the matter is taken under submission.

Judgment entered.
